mapper.select:
WITH , participation_stats AS ( SELECT sr.root_name AS department_name, NVL(ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT ca.USER_ID) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT u.USER_ID), 0) * 100, 1), 0) AS participation_rate FROM selected_roots sr LEFT JOIN selected_tree st ON st.root_id = sr.root_id LEFT JOIN USERS u ON u.DEPARTMENT_ID = st.department_id
LEFT JOIN COURSE_APPLICATION ca ON ca.USER_ID = u.USER_ID AND ca.APPLICATION_STATUS IN ('WAITING', 'APPROVED') AND ca.APPLIED_AT >= #{startDate} AND ca.APPLIED_AT < #{endDate} + 1 GROUP BY sr.root_name ), completion_stats AS ( SELECT sr.root_name AS department_name, NVL(ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN cls.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(cls.COURSE_LEARNING_ID), 0) * 100, 1), 0) AS completion_rate FROM selected_roots sr LEFT JOIN selected_tree st ON st.root_id = sr.root_id LEFT JOIN USERS u ON u.DEPARTMENT_ID = st.department_id
LEFT JOIN COURSE_LEARNING_STATUS cls ON cls.USER_ID = u.USER_ID AND cls.STATUS != 'CANCELED' AND cls.UPDATED_AT >= #{startDate} AND cls.UPDATED_AT < #{endDate} + 1 GROUP BY sr.root_name ), competency_stats AS ( SELECT sr.root_name AS department_name, NVL(ROUND(AVG(ucs.SCORE), 1), 0) AS competency_score FROM selected_roots sr LEFT JOIN selected_tree st ON st.root_id = sr.root_id LEFT JOIN USERS u ON u.DEPARTMENT_ID = st.department_id
LEFT JOIN USER_COMPETENCY_SCORE ucs ON ucs.USER_ID = u.USER_ID AND ucs.CALCULATED_AT >= #{startDate} AND ucs.CALCULATED_AT < #{endDate} + 1 GROUP BY sr.root_name ), quarterly_competency_scores AS ( SELECT sr.root_name AS department_name, TRUNC(csh.CALCULATED_AT, 'Q') AS quarter_start, AVG(csh.SCORE) AS average_score FROM selected_roots sr JOIN selected_tree st ON st.root_id = sr.root_id JOIN USERS u ON u.DEPARTMENT_ID = st.department_id JOIN COMPETENCY_SCORE_HISTORY csh ON csh.USER_ID = u.USER_ID WHERE csh.CALCULATED_AT >= #{startDate} AND csh.CALCULATED_AT < #{endDate} + 1
GROUP BY sr.root_name, TRUNC(csh.CALCULATED_AT, 'Q') ), growth_stats AS ( SELECT department_name, NVL(ROUND( ( MAX(average_score) KEEP (DENSE_RANK LAST ORDER BY quarter_start) - MAX(average_score) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY quarter_start) ) / NULLIF(MAX(average_score) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY quarter_start), 0) * 100, 1 ), 0) AS growth_rate FROM quarterly_competency_scores GROUP BY department_name ) SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM selected_roots) AS departmentCount, ( SELECT department_name FROM ( SELECT department_name, participation_rate FROM participation_stats ORDER BY participation_rate DESC NULLS LAST, department_name ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) AS topParticipationDepartmentName, (SELECT NVL(MAX(participation_rate), 0) FROM participation_stats) AS topParticipationRate, (SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(participation_rate), 1), 0) FROM participation_stats) AS averageParticipationRate, ( SELECT department_name FROM ( SELECT department_name, completion_rate FROM completion_stats ORDER BY completion_rate DESC NULLS LAST, department_name ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) AS topCompletionDepartmentName, (SELECT NVL(MAX(completion_rate), 0) FROM completion_stats) AS topCompletionRate, (SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(completion_rate), 1), 0) FROM completion_stats) AS averageCompletionRate, ( SELECT department_name FROM ( SELECT department_name, competency_score FROM competency_stats ORDER BY competency_score DESC NULLS LAST, department_name ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) AS topCompetencyDepartmentName, (SELECT NVL(MAX(competency_score), 0) FROM competency_stats) AS topCompetencyScore, (SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(competency_score), 1), 0) FROM competency_stats) AS averageCompetencyScore, ( SELECT department_name FROM ( SELECT department_name, growth_rate FROM growth_stats ORDER BY growth_rate DESC NULLS LAST, department_name ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) AS topGrowthDepartmentName, (SELECT NVL(MAX(growth_rate), 0) FROM growth_stats) AS topGrowthRate, (SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(growth_rate), 1), 0) FROM growth_stats) AS averageGrowthRate FROM DUAL

WITH
SELECT sr.root_name AS label, NVL(ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT ca.USER_ID) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT u.USER_ID), 0) * 100, 1), 0) AS value FROM selected_roots sr LEFT JOIN selected_tree st ON st.root_id = sr.root_id LEFT JOIN USERS u ON u.DEPARTMENT_ID = st.department_id
LEFT JOIN COURSE_APPLICATION ca ON ca.USER_ID = u.USER_ID AND ca.APPLICATION_STATUS IN ('WAITING', 'APPROVED') AND ca.APPLIED_AT >= #{startDate} AND ca.APPLIED_AT < #{endDate} + 1 GROUP BY sr.root_id, sr.root_name ORDER BY sr.root_name

WITH
SELECT sr.root_name AS label, NVL(ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN cls.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(cls.COURSE_LEARNING_ID), 0) * 100, 1), 0) AS value FROM selected_roots sr LEFT JOIN selected_tree st ON st.root_id = sr.root_id LEFT JOIN USERS u ON u.DEPARTMENT_ID = st.department_id
LEFT JOIN COURSE_LEARNING_STATUS cls ON cls.USER_ID = u.USER_ID AND cls.STATUS != 'CANCELED' AND cls.UPDATED_AT >= #{startDate} AND cls.UPDATED_AT < #{endDate} + 1 GROUP BY sr.root_id, sr.root_name ORDER BY sr.root_name

WITH
SELECT sr.root_name AS departmentName, comp.COMPETENCY_NAME AS competencyName, NVL(ROUND(AVG(ucs.SCORE), 1), 0) AS score FROM selected_roots sr CROSS JOIN COMPETENCY comp LEFT JOIN selected_tree st ON st.root_id = sr.root_id LEFT JOIN USERS u ON u.DEPARTMENT_ID = st.department_id
LEFT JOIN USER_COMPETENCY_SCORE ucs ON ucs.USER_ID = u.USER_ID AND ucs.COMPETENCY_ID = comp.COMPETENCY_ID AND ucs.CALCULATED_AT >= #{startDate} AND ucs.CALCULATED_AT < #{endDate} + 1 WHERE comp.USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY sr.root_id, sr.root_name, comp.COMPETENCY_NAME ORDER BY sr.root_name, comp.COMPETENCY_NAME

WITH , periods AS ( SELECT period_start, CASE #{periodUnit} WHEN 'DAY' THEN period_start + 1 WHEN 'WEEK' THEN period_start + 7 WHEN 'MONTH' THEN ADD_MONTHS(period_start, 1) ELSE ADD_MONTHS(period_start, 3) END AS period_end, CASE #{periodUnit} WHEN 'DAY' THEN TO_CHAR(period_start, 'MM/DD') WHEN 'WEEK' THEN TO_CHAR(period_start, 'MM/DD') || '주' WHEN 'MONTH' THEN TO_CHAR(period_start, 'YYYY-MM') ELSE TO_CHAR(period_start, 'YYYY') || ' Q' || TO_CHAR(period_start, 'Q') END AS period_label FROM ( SELECT CASE #{periodUnit} WHEN 'DAY' THEN #{startDate} + LEVEL - 1 WHEN 'WEEK' THEN TRUNC(#{startDate}, 'IW') + ((LEVEL - 1) * 7) WHEN 'MONTH' THEN ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(#{startDate}, 'MM'), LEVEL - 1) ELSE ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(#{startDate}, 'Q'), (LEVEL - 1) * 3) END AS period_start FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= CASE #{periodUnit} WHEN 'DAY' THEN TRUNC(#{endDate}) - TRUNC(#{startDate}) + 1 WHEN 'WEEK' THEN CEIL((TRUNC(#{endDate}) - TRUNC(#{startDate}, 'IW') + 1) / 7) WHEN 'MONTH' THEN FLOOR(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(#{endDate}, 'MM'), TRUNC(#{startDate}, 'MM'))) + 1 ELSE FLOOR(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(#{endDate}, 'Q'), TRUNC(#{startDate}, 'Q')) / 3) + 1 END ) WHERE period_start < #{endDate} + 1 ), quarterly_competency_scores AS ( SELECT sr.root_id, p.period_start, AVG(csh.SCORE) AS average_score FROM selected_roots sr JOIN selected_tree st ON st.root_id = sr.root_id JOIN USERS u ON u.DEPARTMENT_ID = st.department_id JOIN COMPETENCY_SCORE_HISTORY csh ON csh.USER_ID = u.USER_ID JOIN periods p ON csh.CALCULATED_AT >= p.period_start AND csh.CALCULATED_AT < p.period_end WHERE csh.CALCULATED_AT >= #{startDate} AND csh.CALCULATED_AT < #{endDate} + 1
GROUP BY sr.root_id, p.period_start ), baseline_scores AS ( SELECT root_id, MAX(average_score) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY period_start) AS baseline_score FROM quarterly_competency_scores GROUP BY root_id ) SELECT sr.root_name AS departmentName, p.period_label AS periodLabel, NVL(ROUND( (qcs.average_score - bs.baseline_score) / NULLIF(bs.baseline_score, 0) * 100, 1 ), 0) AS growthRate FROM selected_roots sr CROSS JOIN periods p LEFT JOIN quarterly_competency_scores qcs ON qcs.root_id = sr.root_id AND qcs.period_start = p.period_start LEFT JOIN baseline_scores bs ON bs.root_id = sr.root_id ORDER BY sr.root_name, p.period_start

WITH
SELECT rn AS rank, '조직' AS badgeText, badge_tone AS badgeTone, label, value FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT ca.USER_ID) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT u.USER_ID), 0) DESC NULLS LAST, sr.root_name) AS rn, CASE MOD(ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT ca.USER_ID) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT u.USER_ID), 0) DESC NULLS LAST, sr.root_name), 4) WHEN 1 THEN 'green' WHEN 2 THEN 'blue' WHEN 3 THEN 'orange' ELSE 'purple' END AS badge_tone, sr.root_name AS label, NVL(ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT ca.USER_ID) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT u.USER_ID), 0) * 100, 1), 0) AS value FROM selected_roots sr LEFT JOIN selected_tree st ON st.root_id = sr.root_id LEFT JOIN USERS u ON u.DEPARTMENT_ID = st.department_id
LEFT JOIN COURSE_APPLICATION ca ON ca.USER_ID = u.USER_ID AND ca.APPLICATION_STATUS IN ('WAITING', 'APPROVED') AND ca.APPLIED_AT >= #{startDate} AND ca.APPLIED_AT < #{endDate} + 1 GROUP BY sr.root_name ) WHERE rn <= 5 ORDER BY rn

WITH
SELECT root_name AS departmentName, rn AS rank, course_title AS courseTitle, application_count AS value FROM ( SELECT sr.root_name, c.COURSE_TITLE AS course_title, COUNT(*) AS application_count, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY sr.root_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, c.COURSE_TITLE ) AS rn FROM selected_roots sr JOIN selected_tree st ON st.root_id = sr.root_id JOIN USERS u ON u.DEPARTMENT_ID = st.department_id JOIN COURSE_APPLICATION ca ON ca.USER_ID = u.USER_ID JOIN COURSE c ON c.COURSE_ID = ca.COURSE_ID WHERE ca.APPLICATION_STATUS IN ('WAITING', 'APPROVED') AND ca.APPLIED_AT >= #{startDate} AND ca.APPLIED_AT < #{endDate} + 1
GROUP BY sr.root_id, sr.root_name, c.COURSE_TITLE ) WHERE rn <= 5 ORDER BY departmentName, rank
